name: _log_to_jsonl
desc: Append knowledge to the immutable text ledger.

name: search
desc: Synaptic Search: Combines Full-Text + 1-Hop Graph Association

name: _analyze_file_content
desc: Extract tags from Harvester's analysis block in the MD file.

name: touch_entity
desc: Legacy touch. Now routes to activate_memory.

name: add_relation
desc: Adds a new relation to the knowledge graph.

name: validate_id
desc:
Enforces strict ID format to prevent path traversal.
强制执行严格的 ID 格式以防止路径遍历。

name: validate_category
desc:
Enforces category whitelist to prevent arbitrary file writes.
强制执行类别白名单以防止任意文件写入。

name: get_entropy_stats
desc:
Returns the current entropy report of the knowledge graph.
返回知识图谱的当前熵值报告。

name: get_entropy_report
desc:
Triggers an immediate analysis of the knowledge graph.
触发对知识图谱的即时分析。

name: get_current_time
desc:
Returns the current time in the specified timezone (default: UTC).
Format: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:M

name: ponder
desc:
The Cognitive Loop: Analyzes the Knowledge Graph for patterns, 
risks, and hidden connections.

name: _self_reflect
desc: Generate a diary-like self summary based on graph metrics.

name: _generate_structural_intuitions
desc: Find nodes that share exact targets (Structural Overlap / Epistemic Depth)

name: _generate_curiosity
desc: Find nodes with exactly 1 edge (Superficial Knowledge)

name: ingest_repository
desc: [Omniscience Protocol] Deep scan of the codebase.

name: _analyze_javascript_regex_ast
desc: Polyglot Deterministic Extraction: Simulating Tree-sitter using zero-dependency Regex for JS/TS.

name: _analyze_python_ast
desc: Use Python's native AST to understand code structure.

name: learn
desc: Legacy single file learning (kept for compatibility)

name: _log_to_jsonl
desc: Append knowledge to the immutable text ledger.

name: search
desc: Synaptic Search: Combines Full-Text + 1-Hop Graph Association

name: _run_sandbox_tests
desc: AST Loop Preparation: Verifies local MCP and systems logic via subprocess.

name: _analyze_file_content
desc: Extract tags from Harvester's analysis block in the MD file.

name: validate_id
desc:
Enforces strict ID format to prevent path traversal.
强制执行严格的 ID 格式以防止路径遍历。

name: validate_category
desc:
Enforces category whitelist to prevent arbitrary file writes.
强制执行类别白名单以防止任意文件写入。

name: get_entropy_stats
desc:
Returns the current entropy report of the knowledge graph.
返回知识图谱的当前熵值报告。

name: get_entropy_report
desc:
Triggers an immediate analysis of the knowledge graph.
触发对知识图谱的即时分析。

name: get_current_time
desc:
Returns the current time in the specified timezone (default: UTC).
Format: ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:M

name: add_entity
desc:
Safely adds a new entity to the knowledge graph.
Strictly Append-Only: Fails if ID already exists.
安

name: connect_entities
desc:
Connects two existing entities.
Fails if either entity does not exist.
连接两个现有实体。如果任一实体不存在则失败。

name: _fetch_repo_data
desc: Thread worker to fetch data for a single repository.

name: add_entity
desc:
Adds a new entity to the knowledge graph.
向知识图谱添加新实体。

name: touch_entity
desc: Legacy touch. Now routes to activate_memory.

name: activate_memory
desc:
Neural Upgrade: Activates a memory, increasing its weight and updating the timestamp.
神经升级：激活记忆，增加权重

name: add_relation
desc: Adds a new relation to the knowledge graph.
